messages.content: 运用数据处理技术对所爬取的天气质量数据跨越进行哪些可视化分析

1. 基于时间的可视化分析：可以将不同时间段内的天气质量数据进行可视化处理，比如制作折线图、柱状图、堆积图等，以便分析和比较不同时间段内的天气变化情况。

2. 基于地理位置的可视化分析：可以根据所爬取的数据中包含的地理位置信息，将不同地区的天气质量数据进行可视化处理，比如绘制热力图、地图、散点图等，以便分析不同地区的天气质量状况。

3. 多因素交互可视化分析：可以结合其他相关因素，如太阳辐射强度、风速、湿度等，制作热力图、散点图、雷达图等，以便分析其与天气质量之间的关系和交互作用。

4. 时序可视化分析：可以基于天气质量数据的时序特性，制作时序图、热力图、堆叠图等，以便分析不同时间段内天气质量的波动情况和趋势变化。

5. 表格可视化分析：可以将所爬取的天气质量数据制作成各种表格，包括数据表、透视表、交叉表等，以便更直观地展示和分析数据的结构和特征。

w and b are the coefficients that have to be 
estimated from data. A parameter ε represents deviation between the actual values and 
the regression function which can be treated as a tube around the regression function. 
Points outside the tube are considered as training errors. By minimising the regularised 
risk function represented by the following equation, the coefficients w and b are 
determined.翻译
w和b是需要从数据中估计的系数。参数ε表示实际值与回归函数之间的偏差，可以被视为回归函数周围的管道。管道外的点被视为训练误差。通过最小化由下面的方程表示的正则化风险函数，可以确定系数w和b。

The error rate of SVM is lower than all 
algorithms i.e., 0.0026. The root mean square error for average pressure is high for Linear 
Regression i.e., 0.8682. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate of SVM is 
lower than all algorithms i.e., 0.0037. The root mean square error for humidity is high for 
Linear Regression i.e., 0.5683. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate of 
SVM is lower than all algorithms i.e., 0.0036.翻译
SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.0026。对于平均气压，线性回归的均方根误差较高，即0.8682。CART和MLP的错误率较低。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.0037。对于湿度，线性回归的均方根误差较高，即0.5683。CART和MLP的错误率较低。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.0036。

The root mean square error for average temperature is high for Linear Regression i.e., 
0.3771. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate of SVM is lower than all 
algorithms i.e., 0.0026. The root mean square error for average pressure is high for Linear 
Regression i.e., 0.8682. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate of SVM is 
lower than all algorithms i.e., 0.0037. The root mean square error for humidity is high for 
Linear Regression i.e., 0.5683. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate of 
SVM is lower than all algorithms i.e., 0.0036.翻译

对于平均温度，线性回归的均方根误差较高，即0.3771。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.0026。对于平均气压，线性回归的均方根误差较高，即0.8682。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.0037。对于湿度，线性回归的均方根误差较高，即0.5683。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.0036。

The mean absolute error for average temperature is high for Linear Regression i.e., 
0.4113. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate of SVM is lower than all 
algorithms i.e., 0.0024. The mean absolute error for average pressure is high for Linear 
Regression i.e., 0.6392. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate of SVM is 
lower than all algorithms i.e., 0.0041. The mean absolute error for humidity is high for 
Linear Regression i.e., 0.7136. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate of 
SVM is lower than all algorithms i.e., 0.003.翻译

对于平均温度，线性回归的平均绝对误差较高，即0.4113。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.0024。对于平均气压，线性回归的平均绝对误差较高，即0.6392。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.0041。对于湿度，线性回归的平均绝对误差较高，即0.7136。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.003。

The relative absolute error for average temperature is high for linear regression i.e., 
52.6169. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate of SVM is lower than all 
algorithms i.e., 0.3024. The relative absolute error for average pressure is high for Linear 
Regression i.e., 51.7942. CART and MLP have low error rates. SVM technique has less error rate than all algorithms i.e., 0.3334. The relative absolute error for humidity is high 
for Linear Regression i.e., 56.9041. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate 
of SVM is lower than all algorithms i.e., 0.242.翻译

对于平均温度，线性回归的相对绝对误差较高，即52.6169。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.3024。对于平均气压，线性回归的相对绝对误差较高，即51.7942。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM技术的误差率比所有算法都要低，即为0.3334。对于湿度，线性回归的相对绝对误差较高，即56.9041。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.242。

The relative root square error for average temperature is high for Linear Regression 
i.e., 54.5311. The error difference between CART and MLP is wide. The error rate of 
SVM is lower than all algorithms i.e., 0.3242. The relative root square error for average 
pressure is high for CART i.e., 75.2337. For Linear Regression, the error rate is 55.5614. 
MLP has error rate of 5.9895. The error rate of SVM is lower than all algorithms i.e., 
0.3528. The relative root square error for humidity is high for Linear Regression i.e., 
66.1252. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate of SVM is lower than all 
algorithms i.e., 0.2498.翻译

对于平均温度，线性回归的相对均方根误差较高，即54.5311。CART和MLP的误差差距较大。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.3242。对于平均气压，CART的相对均方根误差较高，即75.2337。对于线性回归，误差率为55.5614，MLP的误差率为5.9895。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.3528。对于湿度，线性回归的相对均方根误差较高，即66.1252。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比所有算法都要低，即为0.2498。

For the evaluation criteria, SVM has less error rate compared to the remaining 
algorithms. Linear Regression has huge error rates in all cases. In most of the cases, the error rate of CART is less than MLP, but MLP has higher relative root square error than 
CART. 
The entire data collected is divided in 3 : 1 ratio such that first part is the training set 
and the second part is test set. Evaluation is performed on training set for Linear 
Regression, CART, MLP and SVM algorithms. These algorithms have to be applied on 
test set for finding error rates based on the evaluation criteria翻译

在评估标准方面，相比其他算法，SVM的错误率更低。线性回归在所有情况下都具有巨大的误差率。在大多数情况下，CART的误差率低于MLP，但MLP的相对均方根误差高于CART。

收集的整个数据按3：1的比例分成两部分，第一部分是训练集，第二部分是测试集。对于线性回归、CART、MLP和SVM算法，对训练集进行评估。这些算法必须应用于测试集，以根据评估标准找出错误率。

Variation in root mean square error for the four algorithms with respect to average 
temperature, average pressure and humidity for the test set is represented in Figure 5. 
The root mean square error for average temperature is high for Linear Regression i.e., 
0.992. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error rate of SVM is lower than all 
algorithms i.e., 0.0037 for test set. The root mean square error for average pressure is 
high for Linear Regression i.e., 0.7614. CART and MLP have low error rates. The error 
rate of SVM is lower than all algorithms i.e., 0.0048 for test set. The root mean square 
error for humidity is high for Linear Regression i.e., 0.992. CART and MLP have low 
error rates. The error rate of SVM is lower than all algorithms i.e., 0.0037 for test set.翻译

图5展示了四个算法在测试集上对平均温度、平均气压和湿度的均方根误差变化情况。对于平均温度，线性回归的均方根误差较高，即0.992。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比测试集上所有算法都要低，即为0.0037。对于平均气压，线性回归的均方根误差较高，即0.7614。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比测试集上所有算法都要低，即为0.0048。对于湿度，线性回归的均方根误差较高，即0.992。CART和MLP的误差率较低。SVM的错误率比测试集上所有算法都要低，即为0.0037。
